metadata.name: Forecast: Sky Hussar activates during upkeep, card stays in hand
metadata.description: p1 is in their upkeep step with Sky Hussar in hand. p1 activates Sky Hussar's Forecast ability by paying {W}{U} (CR 702.57a). The ForecastAbility is placed on the stack; Sky Hussar remains in p1's hand (Forecast reveals but does not discard the card). Both players pass priority; the ability resolves. Sky Hussar's Forecast effect is a TODO placeholder (DrawCards 0 — untap-all not yet in DSL), so the net game effect is a no-op, but the stack drains and Sky Hussar is confirmed still in hand. Validates: Forecast activation during upkeep, card stays in hand after activation and after resolution, stack drains cleanly.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.57a: Forecast is a special activated ability that can only be activated from the player's hand. The card is revealed (cosmetically) but is NOT discarded as a cost — it stays in hand before, during, and after activation. CR 702.57b: May only be activated during the upkeep step of the card's owner, and only once each turn. The harness action 'activate_forecast' maps to Command::ActivateForecast { player, card, targets } (replay_harness.rs line 585). The engine uses find_in_hand to locate the ObjectId, deducts the mana cost ({W}{U}) from p1's pool, and pushes a ForecastAbility onto the stack. Sky Hussar's Forecast effect is Effect::DrawCards { count: Fixed(0) } (a TODO placeholder for Effect::UntapAll which does not yet exist in the DSL — see sky_hussar.rs). DrawCards(0) resolves silently as a no-op: no cards drawn, no state changes. The stack_resolve step documents the ability resolving; the resolution array is empty since the placeholder draws 0 cards (no observable effect). After resolution: stack is empty, Sky Hussar is still in p1's hand (hand.count = 1). p1 needs {white: 1, blue: 1} in their mana pool. The phase field passed to parse_step must be 'upkeep' (the harness reads init.phase directly via parse_step — not init.step). No library cards needed because the effect draws 0 cards. p2 has no mana and no cards — minimal initial state.

script.step_note: p1 activates Sky Hussar's Forecast ability during their upkeep; ForecastAbility resolves; Sky Hussar stays in hand

actions.description: Initial: Sky Hussar in p1's hand, stack empty, p1 has {W}{U} in pool
actions.note: CR 702.57a: Sky Hussar is in p1's hand. p1 has {W}{U} available to pay the Forecast cost.

CR 702.57a: p1 activates Sky Hussar's Forecast ability from hand during p1's upkeep. {W}{U} is paid from p1's mana pool. The card is revealed but stays in hand — Forecast does NOT discard the card as cost.

actions.description: After activation: ForecastAbility on stack (count=1), Sky Hussar still in hand (count=1)
actions.note: CR 702.57a: ForecastAbility is now on the stack. Sky Hussar remains in p1's hand — Forecast reveals the card but does not consume it. Stack has exactly 1 object (the forecast ability).
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority. The ForecastAbility at the top of the stack resolves.

CR 608.2 + 702.57a: ForecastAbility resolves. The Forecast effect (untap all creatures you control) is a TODO placeholder — Effect::DrawCards { count: Fixed(0) } — so no observable game state change occurs. The ability resolves cleanly with no cards drawn. Sky Hussar remains in p1's hand.

actions.description: Final: stack empty, Sky Hussar still in p1's hand
actions.note: CR 702.57a: After the ForecastAbility resolves, the stack is empty and Sky Hussar is still in p1's hand. The card was never moved — Forecast only reveals it, it is not discarded, exiled, or cast.
